visual_description: Two men stand on a balcony at night; one in a light shirt holds a phone to his ear while leaning on the railing, the other in a dark suit stands facing him. The man on the phone gestures slightly with his free hand while looking at the other man, who gazes back with a neutral posture. Behind them, buildings with lit windows and a wall with graffiti are visible under dim lighting.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in Mandarin.
